query: low resolution pixelated mosaic blocky digital image
message: sub:digital_artifacts/pixelation — anti_aesthetic — pixel mosaic, blocky low-res, color-cell grids

response.objective_caption: A white stylus with a rounded tip is positioned in the lower left area of the frame beside a large pixelated diagonal staircase pattern composed of black and white square blocks on a smooth gray background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grainy photograph with muted, washed-out tones shows a white stylus with a rounded tip cropped at the lower left frame edge, positioned beside a large pixelated diagonal staircase pattern of black and white square blocks on a gray background. Visible film grain and a desaturated, low-vibrancy palette create a lo-fi, tactile imperfection, while the obstructed cropping of the pen withholds part of the subject for an informal, compositionally abrupt feel.
